name: VTIL_ExportObjectPool
title: VTIL_ExportObjectPool
syntax: long VTIL_ExportObjectPool(dbNode workingSetMaster, char objectPoolFilePath[]); // form 1
description: Exports the current object pool of the Working Set Master into a file (*.iop). An existing file is overwritten.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
